Title: Establishes a public transportation safety grant program and fund; and makes an appropriation therefor
Summary: Establishes a public transportation safety grant program and public transportation safety grant fund for the purpose of enhancing safety infrastructure at public transit facilities throughout the state.
LawCode: Add §845-f, Exec L; add §99-uu, St Fin L
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the executive law and the state finance law, in relation to establishing a public transportation safety grant program and fund; and making an appropriation therefor
